# Sagnik Bhattacharya — Tutorials, Courses, and Tech Consulting

> Hands-on tutorial blog, Hands-on Udemy courses, software development, and tech consulting for learners, teams, and businesses using Flutter, Excel, AI-assisted workflows, and modern developer tools.

This site is best understood as a practical tutorial and professional services website.

Use the blog for step-by-step learning content. Use the courses, services, and project pages to understand Sagnik Bhattacharya's training, consulting, and development work.

## Tutorials

- [Blog](https://sagnikbhattacharya.com/blog): Main tutorial library covering Flutter, Excel, Excel with AI, AI coding tools, and developer workflows.
- [RSS Feed](https://sagnikbhattacharya.com/feed.xml): Recent tutorial updates and new posts.

## Courses & Training

- [Courses](https://sagnikbhattacharya.com/courses): Overview of current and upcoming courses.
- [Udemy Instructor Profile](https://www.udemy.com/user/sagnik-bhattacharya-5/): Published training content and instructor profile.

## Consulting & Development

- [Services](https://sagnikbhattacharya.com/services): Tech consulting, corporate training, app development, and business-focused technology support.
- [Contact](https://sagnikbhattacharya.com/contact): Enquiries for consulting, training, development, and collaboration.

## Projects

- [FarmAdvisor AI](https://farmadvisorai.codingliquids.com/): AI-powered agricultural advisory platform.
- [Kisan Salahkaar](https://kisansalahkaar.codingliquids.com/): Multilingual AI farming assistant.
- [Coding Liquids](https://codingliquids.com): Company and brand site.

## About

- [Home](https://sagnikbhattacharya.com/): Main overview of the site.
- [About](https://sagnikbhattacharya.com/about): Background, expertise, and teaching approach.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/sagnik-bhattacharya-916b9463/): Professional profile.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/sagnik150699): Public code and repositories.
- [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@codingliquids): Video tutorials and related content.

## Optional

- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/sagnikteaches): Social updates.
- [Full Context](https://sagnikbhattacharya.com/llms-full.txt): Expanded version with more context for LLMs and agents.
